name: smart_zone.live_probe_harness_audit_retry_no_setup
description: Supported-step Smart Zone Manager harness-audit retry using a fresh/loadable profile with profile-local function-key bindings for harness reliability; live Zone Manager add flow, prompt/result trace, row coordinate-label trace, then saved-zone metadata inspection.

evidence_contract.green_path: loadable character -> real Zone Manager UI -> Basecamp: Storage add flow -> Smart Zone prompt accepted -> reopened/listed generated zones with row coordinate-label trace and saved-zone metadata inspected after run
evidence_contract.non_green_rule: startup/load, preexisting zone metadata, unguarded key typing, or metadata without the live prompt/result and row-coordinate trace is not feature proof; expected_visible_fact screenshots are not credited unless paired with required screen-text guards.

steps.label: gameplay_loaded_screen_gate
steps.expected_visible_fact: normal gameplay is loaded before Zone Manager input

steps.label: open_zones_manager
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager UI is visibly open through profile-local F1 binding for DEFAULTMODE zones
steps.abort_reason: Zone Manager title text missing after open-zones key; stop before add/filter/generation keys.

steps.label: add_zone
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager add-zone/type picker flow is open through profile-local F2 binding
steps.abort_reason: zone type picker text missing after add-zone key; stop before filter/generation keys.

steps.label: filter_zone_type_picker
steps.expected_visible_fact: zone type picker filter prompt is active through profile-local F3 binding

steps.label: type_storage_zone_filter
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone type picker filter has been submitted for Basecamp: Storage before selecting the filtered row
steps.abort_reason: filtered zone type picker did not show Basecamp Storage text before selection.

steps.label: accept_smart_zone_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: Smart Zone Manager prompt/result checkpoint after accepting generation (accepted through profile-local F4 YES binding)

steps.label: placed_layout_debug_trace
steps.expected_immediate_state: debug log contains accepted prompt and successful generated-zone result from this probe's log delta

steps.label: reopen_zones_manager_for_layout_inspection
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager UI is visibly open through profile-local F1 binding for DEFAULTMODE zones

steps.label: zone_manager_row_trace_audit
steps.expected_immediate_state: debug log contains Zone Manager row trace entries with relative coordinate labels for generated Smart Zones

harness_profile_precondition.profile_local_keybindings: smart-zone-audit-live-20260429e/config/keybindings.json binds DEFAULTMODE zones=F1, ZONES_MANAGER ADD_ZONE=F2, UILIST.FILTER/FILTER/SEARCH=F3, YES=F4 so the proof observes live UI without printable-command delivery ambiguity.
